name: Star Map & Verification
shop_ui_alignment: Shop UI V.9 — same catalog and star-map SKUs as /shop; legacy Shop v4/v5 labels in code refer to this product line.
description: 7 nærmeste stjerner, host→life-bearing b navngivning, Electric Magnet specials. Aligned with Shop V.9 catalog (themes, Star Map 25, verification-adjacent items).
agent_prompt: Star map: 7 nearest stars. Use host→b naming (e.g. Proxima Centauri → Proxima b). Specials: run_verification, run_dna_test, view_star_map.
tech_spec: GET /api/star-map; GET /vidgenerator/api/star-map; data/star_map.json; stars[].life_label, life_bearing; specials: run_verification, run_dna_test, view_star_map
user_guide: Stjernemap viser 7 nærmeste stjerner. Brug verification og DNA test til integritet.
manual: Agent manual V4: When user asks about stars or verification, call star-map API. Offer run_verification and run_dna_test when relevant.

rules.name: Host → B navngivning
rules.text: Life-bearing planeter navngives som host → b (f.eks. Proxima Centauri → Proxima b).

rules.name: Run Verification
rules.text: Electric Magnet special. Integritetsscan af indhold og platform.

rules.name: Run DNA Test
rules.text: Electric Magnet special. DNA-verifikation og test.

rules.name: View Star Map
rules.text: Electric Magnet special. Viser 7 nærmeste stjerner og life-bearing b planeter.

rules.name: Galactic themes i shop
rules.text: Galaxy / Star Map-temaer i shop forstærker visuelt Galactic-cluster; de ændrer ikke stjernedata i star_map.json uden serverlogik.

rules.name: Verification-UI
rules.text: Verification-special forbliver server-drevet; temaer påvirker kun presentation layer i klienten.

rules.name: UI-temaer og stjernedata
rules.text: Shop-temaer (månedlige theme-* m.m.) ændrer ikke data/star_map.json eller star-map API-svar; Galactic-cluster forklares stadig ud fra faktiske stjerner — se V9 for tema-SKU-liste.
